---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Krishi AI
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## 🧑‍🌾 User Story
As a [Farmer/Merchant/Expert/Admin], I want to [action] so that [benefit].

## 🌾 Agricultural Context
How does this relate to Indian farming practices? Which regions/crops/seasons would benefit?

## 🎨 UI/UX Ideas
If applicable, describe how this should look or work. Mockups welcome!

## 🔗 Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered?

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, references, or screenshots.
